overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction game showing a character walking through a futuristic space station terminal and entering a hangar to approach a parked spaceship. The scene transitions from a rainy city view through observation windows to the interior of a spacecraft hangar.

scene_state.functional_zone: space station observation deck overlooking rainy city

agents.ego_description: walking along the observation deck, looking out at the rainy cityscape through large windows

entered.detail: large panoramic window showing rainy exterior cityscape with neon lights
dark futuristic city visible through the window with heavy rain and atmospheric haze
futuristic metal seating along the left wall
safety railing along the right side overlooking lower level

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a space station observation deck with large windows revealing a stormy, neon-lit city outside. The interior features modern benches and metal railings with cool blue-purple artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: passenger terminal corridor with seating and digital displays

events.description: approaching the hangar entrance doorway at the end of the terminal corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through the terminal past seating areas and digital displays toward the hangar entrance

entered.detail: large digital billboard displaying advertisements on the right wall
rows of benches for passengers along the left side
large security doorway marked with hangar signage at the end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds through a well-lit terminal corridor featuring passenger seating and digital advertisement screens, approaching a security doorway marked for hangar access at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: hangar access corridor and airlock transition

events.description: passes through security door into the hangar access corridor
lighting shifts from cool white terminal lights to warm amber industrial hangar lighting

agents.ego_description: walking through the hangar access corridor while automatically equipping a spacesuit helmet for the hangar environment

entered.detail: industrial metal walls with warning stripes and safety signage
illuminated poster on the corridor wall showing a person
backlit sign reading HANGAR SERVICES mounted on the wall
large window looking into the main hangar bay showing the parked ship

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a narrower industrial corridor with metal walls and safety markings, passing an observation window that reveals the hangar interior. The lighting transitions from cool white to warm amber as the character approaches the main hangar bay.

scene_state.functional_zone: spacecraft hangar bay with parked fighter ship

events.description: exits corridor and enters the vast open hangar bay with the spaceship visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking across the marked hangar floor toward a large parked spaceship, approaching the vessel's loading ramp and cockpit

notable_agents.action: large spaceship parked on the hangar floor with engines idling and ramp extended

entered.detail: massive twin-engine spacecraft with extended wings and detailed hull plating parked in the hangar center
tall industrial service tower with lighting rigs on the left side of the hangar
floor-mounted amber lights marking the landing pad boundaries

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a vast industrial hangar bay, walking across the marked tarmac toward a large parked spaceship. The ship grows larger as the character approaches, revealing detailed engines, an entry ramp, and cockpit in the warm amber lighting of the hangar.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a moody, neon-lit observation deck into the expansive warmth of a spacecraft hangar. It begins by following a character past large windows overlooking a stormy city, moving through a sleek terminal filled with modern benches and digital advertisements under cool blue-purple lighting. As the character proceeds toward a security doorway, the scene shifts into a narrower industrial corridor where the lighting transitions from cool white to a warm amber glow. The camera then passes a final observation window before emerging into a vast hangar bay, crossing the marked tarmac toward a massive parked spaceship. The shot concludes as the ship looms larger in the frame, revealing the intricate details of its engines and entry ramp under the amber industrial lights.
